TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr-fishing_Muu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: sua iku ia Ka'angiana Mu'u sua nganaraku.
S.PHON: sua iku ia kaʔaŋiana muʔu sua ŋanar~ɾaku.
S.FORM: sua iku ia Ka'angiana Mu'u sua nganaraku.
S.PHON: sua iku ia kaʔaŋiana muʔu sua ŋanar~ɾaku.

TRANSL.notes: 我是Ka'angiana Mu'u,(那是)是我的名字.

S.TRANSL: 我是Ka'angiana Mu'u, 是我的名字.
I am Ka'angiana Mu'u, that is my name.

S.FORM: pʉʉ teku pʉ'ʉna sua makai pinarupu misee.
S.PHON: pɨɨ teku pɨʔɨna sua makai pinar~ɾupu misee.
S.FORM: pʉʉ teku pʉ'ʉna sua makai pinarupu misee.
S.PHON: pɨɨ teku pɨʔɨna sua makai pinar~ɾupu misee.
S.TRANSL: 我要講比如說像釣魚的故事.
I'm going to tell a story about fishing.

S.FORM: sua pinarupu misee ia cucuru sua ka'an saihu ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pinarupu sii sua pinarupu ia tikirimpikita piacapa.
S.PHON: sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia ʦuʦur~ɾu sua kaʔan saihu ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pinar~ɾupu sii sua pinar~ɾupu ia tikir~ɾimpikita piaʦapa.
S.FORM: sua pinarupu misee ia cucuru sua ka'an saihu ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pinarupu sii sua pinarupu ia tikirimpikita piacapa.
S.PHON: sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia ʦuʦur~ɾu sua kaʔan saihu ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pinar~ɾupu sii sua pinar~ɾupu ia tikir~ɾimpikita piaʦapa.
S.TRANSL: 如果說釣魚,不是很懂的話就不會釣魚, 因為釣魚我們要會懂先找釣竿.
Speaking of fishing, if we go fishing, you don't know how to fish, then we find the fishing pole first.

S.FORM: sua piacapa kisʉʉn ia noo kakia pu'a namanamarʉ sua piacapa ia tekita kamanʉng takacicin kapani.
S.PHON: sua piaʦapa kisɨɨn ia noo kakia puʔa namanamar~ɾɨ sua piaʦapa ia tekita kamanɨŋ takaʦiʦin kapani.
S.FORM: sua piacapa kisʉʉn ia noo kakia pu'a namanamarʉ sua piacapa ia tekita kamanʉng takacicin kapani.
S.PHON: sua piaʦapa kisɨɨn ia noo kakia puʔa namanamar~ɾɨ sua piaʦapa ia tekita kamanɨŋ takaʦiʦin kapani.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們沒有在平地買的話,釣竿我們要從桂竹那裏自己做.

TRANSL.notes: If we cannot buy the fishing pole on the plain (in the city), we will make it on our own.

S.TRANSL: If we cannot buy the fishing pole on the plain , we will make it on our own.

S.FORM: sua kapani ia mʉngʉtʉnpikita kapani.
S.PHON: sua kapani ia mɨŋɨtɨnpikita kapani.
S.FORM: sua kapani ia mʉngʉtʉnpikita kapani.
S.PHON: sua kapani ia mɨŋɨtɨnpikita kapani.
S.TRANSL: 我們要先砍桂竹.
We need to cut down bamboo sticks.

S.FORM: umi'inacʉ masii mamanʉng 'urupacʉn pinarupu.
S.PHON: umiʔinaʦɨ masii mamanɨŋ ʔur~ɾupaʦɨn pinar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: umi'inacʉ masii mamanʉng 'urupacʉn pinarupu.
S.PHON: umiʔinaʦɨ masii mamanɨŋ ʔur~ɾupaʦɨn pinar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 弄直的話才會很好用來釣魚.
It we straighten it, it'll be good to be used to fish.

S.FORM: nakai 'inmamia 'apianarasʉkitana noo tecikita pinarupu ia kumakorupikita ngica'ʉ.
S.PHON: nakai ʔinmamia ʔapianar~ɾasɨkitana noo teʦikita pinar~ɾupu ia kumakor~ɾupikita ŋiʦaʔɨ.
S.FORM: nakai 'inmamia 'apianarasʉkitana noo tecikita pinarupu ia kumakorupikita ngica'ʉ.
S.PHON: nakai ʔinmamia ʔapianar~ɾasɨkitana noo teʦikita pinar~ɾupu ia kumakor~ɾupikita ŋiʦaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 只是當我們要釣魚的時候,只是讓我們困擾的是, 我們還要挖蚯蚓.
If we're to go fishing, we need to dig hard for earthworms.

S.FORM: kumakorupikita ngʉca'ʉ tia pʉn.
S.PHON: kumakor~ɾupikita ŋɨʦaʔɨ tia pɨn.
S.FORM: kumakorupikita ngʉca'ʉ tia pʉn.
S.PHON: kumakor~ɾupikita ŋɨʦaʔɨ tia pɨn.
S.TRANSL: 要先挖蚯蚓做餌.
We dig for earthworms and get them on the hook.

S.FORM: sua pʉn sua pʉn ia noo kai pakinen na narupu ia ka'an tia tavarʉ'ʉʉn marinarupu sua vutukuru.
S.PHON: sua pɨn sua pɨn ia noo kai pakinen na nar~ɾupu ia kaʔan tia tavar~ɾɨʔɨɨn mar~ɾinar~ɾupu sua vutukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: sua pʉn sua pʉn ia noo kai pakinen na narupu ia ka'an tia tavarʉ'ʉʉn marinarupu sua vutukuru.
S.PHON: sua pɨn sua pɨn ia noo kai pakinen na nar~ɾupu ia kaʔan tia tavar~ɾɨʔɨɨn mar~ɾinar~ɾupu sua vutukur~ɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 鉤呢,如果沒有附著在魚鉤上,(不然)就不會鉤到那個魚.

S.TRANSL: 鉤呢,如果沒有附著在魚鉤上, 就不會鉤到那個魚.

TRANSL.notes: We hook them up, (otherwise) we won't be able to catch the fish.

S.TRANSL: We hook them up, we won't be able to catch the fish.

S.FORM: sii sua vutukuru ia 'inmamia ngʉca'ʉ sua kʉnen.
S.PHON: sii sua vutukur~ɾu ia ʔinmamia ŋɨʦaʔɨ sua kɨnen.
S.FORM: sii sua vutukuru ia 'inmamia ngʉca'ʉ sua kʉnen.
S.PHON: sii sua vutukur~ɾu ia ʔinmamia ŋɨʦaʔɨ sua kɨnen.
S.TRANSL: 因為魚呢,只有吃蚯蚓.
Because the fish only eat earthworms.

S.FORM: nakai sua pinarupu misee ia noo kakia saihu ia tekia mokusa na ta'una taisua vutukuru.
S.PHON: nakai sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia noo kakia saihu ia tekia mokusa na taʔuna taisua vutukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: nakai sua pinarupu misee ia noo kakia saihu ia tekia mokusa na ta'una taisua vutukuru.
S.PHON: nakai sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia noo kakia saihu ia tekia mokusa na taʔuna taisua vutukur~ɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 但是有關釣魚,如果不是很會的話,(不懂得)要去經常有魚的地方.

S.TRANSL: 但是有關釣魚,如果不是很會的話, 要去經常有魚的地方.
But speaking of fishing, if we don't have the skill, we need to go to the place where there are fish.

S.FORM: mata tepikia pu'a narupu pu'a 'uracʉ kumiri na sua tai Uh.
S.PHON: mata tepikia puʔa nar~ɾupu puʔa ʔur~ɾaʦɨ kumir~ɾi na sua tai uh.
S.FORM: mata tepikia pu'a narupu pu'a 'uracʉ kumiri na sua tai Uh.
S.PHON: mata tepikia puʔa nar~ɾupu puʔa ʔur~ɾaʦɨ kumir~ɾi na sua tai uh.
S.TRANSL: 另外我們還要買魚鉤, 買魚絲, 栓在...

S.FORM: piacapa.
S.PHON: piaʦapa.
S.FORM: piacapa.
S.PHON: piaʦapa.
S.TRANSL: 釣竿.
Fishing pole.

S.FORM: kiriinci nia sua 'uracʉ.
S.PHON: kir~ɾiinʦi nia sua ʔur~ɾaʦɨ.
S.FORM: kiriinci nia sua 'uracʉ.
S.PHON: kir~ɾiinʦi nia sua ʔur~ɾaʦɨ.
S.TRANSL: 把魚線栓在那.

S.FORM: kumiri nia sua narupu.
S.PHON: kumir~ɾi nia sua nar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: kumiri nia sua narupu.
S.PHON: kumir~ɾi nia sua nar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 把鉤子栓在那邊.
The fishing thread is tied up there on the hook.

S.FORM: ka'an 'inmamia narupu sua kiria 'inia.
S.PHON: kaʔan ʔinmamia nar~ɾupu sua kir~ɾia ʔinia.
S.FORM: ka'an 'inmamia narupu sua kiria 'inia.
S.PHON: kaʔan ʔinmamia nar~ɾupu sua kir~ɾia ʔinia.
S.TRANSL: 不是只有魚鉤要栓在那邊.

TRANSL.notes: It's not just about the hook where it (the thread) is tied.

S.TRANSL: It's not just about the hook where it is tied.

S.FORM: kirinpa nia 'uracʉ kumiri inia narupu ʉsʉ'ʉʉncu.
S.PHON: kir~ɾinpa nia ʔur~ɾaʦɨ kumir~ɾi inia nar~ɾupu ɨsɨʔɨɨnʦu.
S.FORM: kirinpa nia 'uracʉ kumiri inia narupu ʉsʉ'ʉʉncu.
S.PHON: kir~ɾinpa nia ʔur~ɾaʦɨ kumir~ɾi inia nar~ɾupu ɨsɨʔɨɨnʦu.
S.TRANSL: 先要把魚絲栓在那哩,再把鉤子栓在那裡,然後再放鉛.
We still have to tie the thread first, and then tie it on the hook.

S.FORM: noo kai isee varʉvarʉ ia ka'ankita tavarʉ'ʉ pinarupu.
S.PHON: noo kai isee var~ɾɨvar~ɾɨ ia kaʔankita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pinar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: noo kai isee varʉvarʉ ia ka'ankita tavarʉ'ʉ pinarupu.
S.PHON: noo kai isee var~ɾɨvar~ɾɨ ia kaʔankita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pinar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 如果沒有放鉛的話,我們就不能釣魚.
If we don't put VARUVARU, then we cannot fish.

S.FORM: noo nisʉ'ʉnci varʉvarʉ ia nisʉ'ʉʉnci nia pʉn.
S.PHON: noo nisɨʔɨnʦi var~ɾɨvar~ɾɨ ia nisɨʔɨɨnʦi nia pɨn.
S.FORM: noo nisʉ'ʉnci varʉvarʉ ia nisʉ'ʉʉnci nia pʉn.
S.PHON: noo nisɨʔɨnʦi var~ɾɨvar~ɾɨ ia nisɨʔɨɨnʦi nia pɨn.
S.TRANSL: 如果已經放了鉛,就可以放魚餌在那裡了.
If we already put lead, the we can put the bait there.

S.FORM: sua pʉn kisʉʉn ia ngica'ʉ.
S.PHON: sua pɨn kisɨɨn ia ŋiʦaʔɨ.
S.FORM: sua pʉn kisʉʉn ia ngica'ʉ.
S.PHON: sua pɨn kisɨɨn ia ŋiʦaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 所謂的魚餌就是蚯蚓.
The bait here means the earthworm.

S.FORM: ngʉca'ʉ ia nikora nʉmʉra.
S.PHON: ŋɨʦaʔɨ ia nikor~ɾa nɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.FORM: ngʉca'ʉ ia nikora nʉmʉra.
S.PHON: ŋɨʦaʔɨ ia nikor~ɾa nɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 蚯蚓呢,在草叢挖.
As for the earthworms, we dig for them in the mountain.

S.FORM: noo kakia saihu tekirim tia pʉn ia ka'ankita tavarʉ'ʉ pinarupu.
S.PHON: noo kakia saihu tekir~ɾim tia pɨn ia kaʔankita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pinar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: noo kakia saihu tekirim tia pʉn ia ka'ankita tavarʉ'ʉ pinarupu.
S.PHON: noo kakia saihu tekir~ɾim tia pɨn ia kaʔankita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pinar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 如果不會找要當作魚餌的,我們就沒辦法釣魚.
If we're not able to find any to serve as the bait, we cannot go fishing.

S.FORM: sua pinarupu misee ia mokusakia na 'aci.
S.PHON: sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia mokusakia na ʔaʦi.
S.FORM: sua pinarupu misee ia mokusakia na 'aci.
S.PHON: sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia mokusakia na ʔaʦi.
S.TRANSL: 講到釣魚,我們去河流的交匯處.
To fish, we go to the converging point of the rivers.

S.FORM: sua 'aci kisʉʉn ia kan tavarʉ'ʉkam.
S.PHON: sua ʔaʦi kisɨɨn ia kan tavar~ɾɨʔɨkam.
S.FORM: sua 'aci kisʉʉn ia kan tavarʉ'ʉkam.
S.PHON: sua ʔaʦi kisɨɨn ia kan tavar~ɾɨʔɨkam.

TRANSL.notes: 這個所謂的'aci(河流匯集處)你們知道嗎 !?

S.TRANSL: 這個所謂的'aci 你們知道嗎 !?

TRANSL.notes: You should know about the so-called 'aaci' (converging point of rivers).

S.TRANSL: You should know about the so-called 'aaci' .

S.FORM: necʉre sua 'aci kisʉʉn ia caniava noo pomiri'in sua cakʉran.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe sua ʔaʦi kisɨɨn ia ʦaniava noo pomir~ɾiʔin sua ʦakɨr~ɾan.
S.FORM: necʉre sua 'aci kisʉʉn ia caniava noo pomiri'in sua cakʉran.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe sua ʔaʦi kisɨɨn ia ʦaniava noo pomir~ɾiʔin sua ʦakɨr~ɾan.
S.TRANSL: 如果河水滿起來了…
If the river level rises…

S.FORM: pomiri'in sua cakʉran makai ruurupacʉʉn sapuarʉ rumariu'u ia isua sua soraru kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: pomir~ɾiʔin sua ʦakɨr~ɾan makai r~ɾuur~ɾupaʦɨɨn sapuar~ɾɨ r~ɾumar~ɾiuʔu ia isua sua sor~ɾar~ɾu kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: pomiri'in sua cakʉran makai ruurupacʉʉn sapuarʉ rumariu'u ia isua sua soraru kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: pomir~ɾiʔin sua ʦakɨr~ɾan makai r~ɾuur~ɾupaʦɨɨn sapuar~ɾɨ r~ɾumar~ɾiuʔu ia isua sua sor~ɾar~ɾu kisɨɨn.

TRANSL.notes: 如果河水漲了,比如像用魚網撈(魚)呢,那就是所謂的颱風.

S.TRANSL: 如果河水漲了,比如像用魚網撈 呢,那就是所謂的颱風.
If the river level rises, we use the net to catch, and that is called typhoon.

S.FORM: 'unaci tavʉna niaran rʉmʉra nonnon tingee kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: ʔunaʦi tavɨna niar~ɾan r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa nonnon tiŋee kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: 'unaci tavʉna niaran rʉmʉra nonnon tingee kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: ʔunaʦi tavɨna niar~ɾan r~ɾɨmɨr~ɾa nonnon tiŋee kisɨɨn.
S.TRANSL: 從山上流下來的溪水就是小溪.
There's a stream flowing from the mountain, and it's called 'nonnon'.

S.FORM: 'una 'aci sumakusa cakʉran na cikura ia pitakusʉʉncu nia narupu.
S.PHON: ʔuna ʔaʦi sumakusa ʦakɨr~ɾan na ʦikur~ɾa ia pitakusɨɨnʦu nia nar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: 'una 'aci sumakusa cakʉran na cikura ia pitakusʉʉncu nia narupu.
S.PHON: ʔuna ʔaʦi sumakusa ʦakɨr~ɾan na ʦikur~ɾa ia pitakusɨɨnʦu nia nar~ɾupu.

TRANSL.notes: 有河流匯集處流著(因颱風造成的)髒水,魚鉤就丟到那了.

S.TRANSL: 有河流匯集處流著 髒水,魚鉤就丟到那了.
There's the converging point where the muddied water flows, and the hook is tossed there.

S.FORM: noo pinarupʉʉnci ia ruma'esici nia vutukuru ia arisʉ'ʉrʉʉncumita makai vutukuru mitatatitingcu nia vutukuru makasia tatia na.
S.PHON: noo pinar~ɾupɨɨnʦi ia r~ɾumaʔesiʦi nia vutukur~ɾu ia ar~ɾisɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨnʦumita makai vutukur~ɾu mitatatitiŋʦu nia vutukur~ɾu makasia tatia na.
S.FORM: noo pinarupʉʉnci ia ruma'esici nia vutukuru ia arisʉ'ʉrʉʉncumita makai vutukuru mitatatitingcu nia vutukuru makasia tatia na.
S.PHON: noo pinar~ɾupɨɨnʦi ia r~ɾumaʔesiʦi nia vutukur~ɾu ia ar~ɾisɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨnʦumita makai vutukur~ɾu mitatatitiŋʦu nia vutukur~ɾu makasia tatia na.
S.TRANSL: 在釣魚時,魚咬那個鉤子的話,那邊搖來搖去,魚很大.
When fishing, if the fish bites the hook, it'll shake there, and the fish is that big.

S.FORM: imo sua po'ʉ'ʉna makai masi kanakanavu sua pinarupu misee ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ sua sipinarupu ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pomuamuarʉ.
S.PHON: imo sua poʔɨʔɨna makai masi kanakanavu sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ sua sipinar~ɾupu ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pomuamuar~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: imo sua po'ʉ'ʉna makai masi kanakanavu sua pinarupu misee ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ sua sipinarupu ia ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ pomuamuarʉ.
S.PHON: imo sua poʔɨʔɨna makai masi kanakanavu sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ sua sipinar~ɾupu ia kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ pomuamuar~ɾɨ.
S.TRANSL: 所以用卡那卡那富語講釣魚的故事呢,如果不會釣魚的話,就不能隨便講.
So, to speak about the fishing, if we don't know how to fish, we cannot say anything wrong about it.

S.FORM: ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ po'isua sua.
S.PHON: kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ poʔisua sua.
S.FORM: ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ po'isua sua.
S.PHON: kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ poʔisua sua.
S.TRANSL: 不可以說關於...
We cannot talk about ...

S.FORM: necʉre sua pinarupu misee ia.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia.
S.FORM: necʉre sua pinarupu misee ia.
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe sua pinar~ɾupu misee ia.

TRANSL.notes: 你看,說到釣魚(這件事).

S.TRANSL: 你看,說到釣魚 .
You see, speaking of the fishing.

S.FORM: tekirikirimpikia pʉnʉ ngʉ'cia'ʉ piacapa kapani.
S.PHON: tekir~ɾikir~ɾimpikia pɨnɨ ŋɨʔʦiaʔɨ piaʦapa kapani.
S.FORM: tekirikirimpikia pʉnʉ ngʉ'cia'ʉ piacapa kapani.
S.PHON: tekir~ɾikir~ɾimpikia pɨnɨ ŋɨʔʦiaʔɨ piaʦapa kapani.

TRANSL.notes: 我(們)先找一找蚯蚓那個餌和竹竿.

S.TRANSL: 我 先找一找蚯蚓那個餌和竹竿.
We try to look for earthworms as the bait and bamboo fishing rod first.

S.FORM: noo kaakia nipu'a punapunarʉ sua piacapa ia mosikarʉpikia rakakapania.
S.PHON: noo kaakia nipuʔa punapunar~ɾɨ sua piaʦapa ia mosikar~ɾɨpikia r~ɾakakapania.
S.FORM: noo kaakia nipu'a punapunarʉ sua piacapa ia mosikarʉpikia rakakapania.
S.PHON: noo kaakia nipuʔa punapunar~ɾɨ sua piaʦapa ia mosikar~ɾɨpikia r~ɾakakapania.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們沒有在平地買到釣竿的話,就要進到有很多竹子的地方.
If we cannot buy the fishing pole on the plain, we will need to enter areas where there are bamboos.

S.FORM: mariparici avarai noo akiaci ia kan mongʉtʉncikia mamia to'omang noo akiaci kapani.
S.PHON: mar~ɾipar~ɾiʦi avar~ɾai noo akiaʦi ia kan moŋɨtɨnʦikia mamia toʔomaŋ noo akiaʦi kapani.
S.FORM: mariparici avarai noo akiaci ia kan mongʉtʉncikia mamia to'omang noo akiaci kapani.
S.PHON: mar~ɾipar~ɾiʦi avar~ɾai noo akiaʦi ia kan moŋɨtɨnʦikia mamia toʔomaŋ noo akiaʦi kapani.

TRANSL.notes: 如果沒有Kapani這個竹子的話,就只好砍(任何其他的)粗的竹子.

S.TRANSL: 如果沒有Kapani這個竹子的話,就只好砍 粗的竹子.
If there is not Kapani bamboo, we can only cut down any other bamboos.

S.FORM: apacoee noo akiaci kapani ia mongʉtʉncikia to'omang ma'ura.
S.PHON: apaʦoee noo akiaʦi kapani ia moŋɨtɨnʦikia toʔomaŋ maʔur~ɾa.
S.FORM: apacoee noo akiaci kapani ia mongʉtʉncikia to'omang ma'ura.
S.PHON: apaʦoee noo akiaʦi kapani ia moŋɨtɨnʦikia toʔomaŋ maʔur~ɾa.

TRANSL.notes: 雖然如果沒有那個小竹子,(我們)就再砍較小一點的粗竹子.

S.TRANSL: 雖然如果沒有那個小竹子, 就再砍較小一點的粗竹子.
If there isn't the bamboo, we will cut down other smaller bamboos.

S.FORM: noo kakia mʉtʉa to'omang ia mongʉtʉnkia ma kanavunavu.
S.PHON: noo kakia mɨtɨa toʔomaŋ ia moŋɨtɨnkia ma kanavunavu.
S.FORM: noo kakia mʉtʉa to'omang ia mongʉtʉnkia ma kanavunavu.
S.PHON: noo kakia mɨtɨa toʔomaŋ ia moŋɨtɨnkia ma kanavunavu.

TRANSL.notes: 我們如果沒有找到(適合)的竹子,我(們)就(隨便)砍Kanavunavu這種竹子.

S.TRANSL: 我們如果沒有找到 的竹子,我 就 砍Kanavunavu這種竹子.
If we don't find the right bamboo, we simply cut down the Kanavunavu bamboo.

S.FORM: kumiri 'inia sua narupu pitatavʉrʉ cacanumu.
S.PHON: kumir~ɾi ʔinia sua nar~ɾupu pitatavɨr~ɾɨ ʦaʦanumu.
S.FORM: kumiri 'inia sua narupu pitatavʉrʉ cacanumu.
S.PHON: kumir~ɾi ʔinia sua nar~ɾupu pitatavɨr~ɾɨ ʦaʦanumu.
S.TRANSL: 把釣鉤綁在竹子上,丟到水裡.

TRANSL.notes: (We) tie up the hook onto the bamboo, and toss it into the water.

S.TRANSL: tie up the hook onto the bamboo, and toss it into the water.

S.FORM: ruma'esici 'inia vutukuru ia 'ancu arikʉnʉʉn sii mecun sua kapani mecun sua vutukuru.
S.PHON: r~ɾumaʔesiʦi ʔinia vutukur~ɾu ia ʔanʦu ar~ɾikɨnɨɨn sii meʦun sua kapani meʦun sua vutukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: ruma'esici 'inia vutukuru ia 'ancu arikʉnʉʉn sii mecun sua kapani mecun sua vutukuru.
S.PHON: r~ɾumaʔesiʦi ʔinia vutukur~ɾu ia ʔanʦu ar~ɾikɨnɨɨn sii meʦun sua kapani meʦun sua vutukur~ɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 魚咬到(上鉤)他的話,拉不動了,因為竹子很重,魚(也)很重.

S.TRANSL: 魚咬到 他的話,拉不動了,因為竹子很重,魚 很重.
When the fish bites it, it becomes hard to pull, because the bamboo is heavy and the fish is heavy too.

S.FORM: sua pina po'isua naru pinarupu misee ia nguai makasua pinarupu.
S.PHON: sua pina poʔisua nar~ɾu pinar~ɾupu misee ia ŋuai makasua pinar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: sua pina po'isua naru pinarupu misee ia nguai makasua pinarupu.
S.PHON: sua pina poʔisua nar~ɾu pinar~ɾupu misee ia ŋuai makasua pinar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 釣魚這件事情就是那樣.
Fishing is just like that.

S.FORM: mʉʉ (noo) nimarinarupucikia ia 'esici makai sana cau ia.
S.PHON: mɨɨ (noo) nimar~ɾinar~ɾupuʦikia ia ʔesiʦi makai sana ʦau ia.
S.FORM: mʉʉ (noo) nimarinarupucikia ia 'esici makai sana cau ia.
S.PHON: mɨɨ (noo) nimar~ɾinar~ɾupuʦikia ia ʔesiʦi makai sana ʦau ia.

TRANSL.notes: 如果(當)釣到魚之後,人比如在那邊了.

S.TRANSL: 如果 釣到魚之後,人比如在那邊了.
If I have caught the fish, and there are people over there.

W.TRANSL: 過去-上鉤=狀態改變=1SG.主格

S.FORM: marisusunukia ioo miseekia noo nimarinarupucikia sua vutukuru.
S.PHON: mar~ɾisusunukia ioo miseekia noo nimar~ɾinar~ɾupuʦikia sua vutukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: marisusunukia ioo miseekia noo nimarinarupucikia sua vutukuru.
S.PHON: mar~ɾisusunukia ioo miseekia noo nimar~ɾinar~ɾupuʦikia sua vutukur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 當我們吊上魚的時候,我們就會呼喊耶~~.
When we catch the fish, we would yell, 'ioooo'.

W.TRANSL: 過去-上鉤=狀態改變=1SG.主格

S.FORM: tarakusacukitana cau ia'a.
S.PHON: tar~ɾakusaʦukitana ʦau iaʔa.
S.FORM: tarakusacukitana cau ia'a.
S.PHON: tar~ɾakusaʦukitana ʦau iaʔa.
S.TRANSL: 人就望著我們看.
People look back at us.

S.FORM: comen sua Cuma WongKun nimarinarupu vutukuru tia misee.
S.PHON: ʦomen sua ʦuma woŋkun nimar~ɾinar~ɾupu vutukur~ɾu tia misee.
S.FORM: comen sua Cuma WongKun nimarinarupu vutukuru tia misee.
S.PHON: ʦomen sua ʦuma woŋkun nimar~ɾinar~ɾupu vutukur~ɾu tia misee.
S.TRANSL: 他們就會說,翁坤叔叔釣到魚好福氣!
They would say, 'Uncle Wung-Kun caught the fish! How fortunate!'

S.FORM: imo sua ikita po'ʉ'ʉna ia tekita masi manʉng pokarikari manasi.
S.PHON: imo sua ikita poʔɨʔɨna ia tekita masi manɨŋ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi manasi.
S.FORM: imo sua ikita po'ʉ'ʉna ia tekita masi manʉng pokarikari manasi.
S.PHON: imo sua ikita poʔɨʔɨna ia tekita masi manɨŋ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi manasi.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們講故事的時候,我們要說清楚.
So, when we tell stories, we have to speak clearly.

S.FORM: ka'ankia masimuci.
S.PHON: kaʔankia masimuʦi.
S.FORM: ka'ankia masimuci.
S.PHON: kaʔankia masimuʦi.
S.TRANSL: 我們才不會說錯.
Then we won't say incorrectly.

S.FORM: mataa noo teen 'uturu sua kari ia tepaku po'ocungun ia sua.
S.PHON: mataa noo teen ʔutur~ɾu sua kar~ɾi ia tepaku poʔoʦuŋun ia sua.
S.FORM: mataa noo teen 'uturu sua kari ia tepaku po'ocungun ia sua.
S.PHON: mataa noo teen ʔutur~ɾu sua kar~ɾi ia tepaku poʔoʦuŋun ia sua.

TRANSL.notes: 如果要講三段話,我還要接下去(補充).

S.TRANSL: 如果要講三段話,我還要接下去 .
If I am to talk about three stories, I still need to continue.

S.FORM: uh makai uh muru'ucang.
S.PHON: uh makai uh mur~ɾuʔuʦaŋ.
S.FORM: uh makai uh muru'ucang.
S.PHON: uh makai uh mur~ɾuʔuʦaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 像結婚.
Like getting married.

S.FORM: sua tenannakʉ ia makasi.
S.PHON: sua tenannakɨ ia makasi.
S.FORM: sua tenannakʉ ia makasi.
S.PHON: sua tenannakɨ ia makasi.
S.TRANSL: 要求婚這樣.
Like proposing.

S.FORM: sua kanakanavu miana ia mokusa nia tia ng(u)coo amisen sua kisaa Sumukun.
S.PHON: sua kanakanavu miana ia mokusa nia tia ŋ(u)ʦoo amisen sua kisaa sumukun.
S.FORM: sua kanakanavu miana ia mokusa nia tia ng(u)coo amisen sua kisaa Sumukun.
S.PHON: sua kanakanavu miana ia mokusa nia tia ŋ(u)ʦoo amisen sua kisaa sumukun.
S.TRANSL: 以前卡那卡那富人要去那裡,布農族話要怎麼說呢 ?
In the past, Kanakanavu people would go there

S.FORM: uh tia ponannakʉ misee.
S.PHON: uh tia ponannakɨ misee.
S.FORM: uh tia ponannakʉ misee.
S.PHON: uh tia ponannakɨ misee.
S.TRANSL: 就是要去'求婚'.
It's the so-called 'propose'.

S.FORM: sua ponannakʉ ia mokusakia nia ka'ankia masimanʉng cucuru.
S.PHON: sua ponannakɨ ia mokusakia nia kaʔankia masimanɨŋ ʦuʦur~ɾu.
S.FORM: sua ponannakʉ ia mokusakia nia ka'ankia masimanʉng cucuru.
S.PHON: sua ponannakɨ ia mokusakia nia kaʔankia masimanɨŋ ʦuʦur~ɾu.

TRANSL.notes: 求婚的話,我們會去那裏(女方家),不會很直接地說.

S.TRANSL: 求婚的話,我們會去那裏 ,不會很直接地說.
To propose, we would go there, and we wouldn't say it very clearly.

S.FORM: pokarikarikia ah nivatukia tekia kan masitanam makarikari kamua.
S.PHON: pokar~ɾikar~ɾikia ah nivatukia tekia kan masitanam makar~ɾikar~ɾi kamua.
S.FORM: pokarikarikia ah nivatukia tekia kan masitanam makarikari kamua.
S.PHON: pokar~ɾikar~ɾikia ah nivatukia tekia kan masitanam makar~ɾikar~ɾi kamua.
S.TRANSL: 我們來,試著要跟你們說.
We came to try to talk to you.

S.FORM: uh man tarikukuamu tekarakiae tavarʉ'ʉ aracani tia apacʉvʉrʉʉn miseekia mamia sua kari.
S.PHON: uh man tar~ɾikukuamu tekar~ɾakiae tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ar~ɾaʦani tia apaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨɨn miseekia mamia sua kar~ɾi.
S.FORM: uh man tarikukuamu tekarakiae tavarʉ'ʉ aracani tia apacʉvʉrʉʉn miseekia mamia sua kari.
S.PHON: uh man tar~ɾikukuamu tekar~ɾakiae tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ar~ɾaʦani tia apaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨɨn miseekia mamia sua kar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我們只有這樣說這些話 : 我能不能拿一隻你們的小雞來養呢?
We only say these words, 'Can I take one of your little chicken to breed?'

S.FORM: uh sua kari isi ia kan 'una 'inia tava ma uh mara'an akanang.
S.PHON: uh sua kar~ɾi isi ia kan ʔuna ʔinia tava ma uh mar~ɾaʔan akanaŋ.
S.FORM: uh sua kari isi ia kan 'una 'inia tava ma uh mara'an akanang.
S.PHON: uh sua kar~ɾi isi ia kan ʔuna ʔinia tava ma uh mar~ɾaʔan akanaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 這樣的話,那邊有些(人)很快就聽懂.

S.TRANSL: 這樣的話,那邊有些 很快就聽懂.
These words, some people there can understand quickly.

S.FORM: nakai sua makai ikia naturu ia ka'an mara'an akanang sii manasʉ amisen sua cau isi manasʉ misee.
S.PHON: nakai sua makai ikia natur~ɾu ia kaʔan mar~ɾaʔan akanaŋ sii manasɨ amisen sua ʦau isi manasɨ misee.
S.FORM: nakai sua makai ikia naturu ia ka'an mara'an akanang sii manasʉ amisen sua cau isi manasʉ misee.
S.PHON: nakai sua makai ikia natur~ɾu ia kaʔan mar~ɾaʔan akanaŋ sii manasɨ amisen sua ʦau isi manasɨ misee.

TRANSL.notes: 但像我比較笨的,不會很快聽得懂,因為也許是(懷疑)這個人為什麼(這樣)講.

S.TRANSL: 但像我比較笨的,不會很快聽得懂,因為也許是 這個人為什麼 講.
But for someone as stupid as I am, we cannot understand quickly, because we don't know why this person say things like this.

S.FORM: nokai manasʉ tepa kesone.
S.PHON: nokai manasɨ tepa kesone.
S.FORM: nokai manasʉ tepa kesone.
S.PHON: nokai manasɨ tepa kesone.
S.TRANSL: 或可能還要再詢問.
Or maybe we still need to ask.

S.FORM: anakaa tesu tekarakasu cucuru mara tarikuka sua ka'ankara sa manukara cau tia misee.
S.PHON: anakaa tesu tekar~ɾakasu ʦuʦur~ɾu mar~ɾa tar~ɾikuka sua kaʔankar~ɾa sa manukar~ɾa ʦau tia misee.
S.FORM: anakaa tesu tekarakasu cucuru mara tarikuka sua ka'ankara sa manukara cau tia misee.
S.PHON: anakaa tesu tekar~ɾakasu ʦuʦur~ɾu mar~ɾa tar~ɾikuka sua kaʔankar~ɾa sa manukar~ɾa ʦau tia misee.
S.TRANSL: 會說,究竟你要...你是不是真的要拿那個雞,還是不是? 是不是人的小孩?
They would say, 'Could it be that you're going to... Are you really going to take the chicken or not? Or is it someone's child?'

S.FORM: noo masi'ʉnʉ'ʉnape ia masi'ʉnʉ'ʉnacikia.
S.PHON: noo masiʔɨnɨʔɨnape ia masiʔɨnɨʔɨnaʦikia.
S.FORM: noo masi'ʉnʉ'ʉnape ia masi'ʉnʉ'ʉnacikia.
S.PHON: noo masiʔɨnɨʔɨnape ia masiʔɨnɨʔɨnaʦikia.

TRANSL.notes: 如果他再一次地說,我也再一次地說(如果他再問,我就再說清楚).

S.TRANSL: 如果他再一次地說,我也再一次地說 .

TRANSL.notes: If they say (ask) again, I will say again (clearly).

S.TRANSL: If they say again, I will say again .

S.FORM: aah 'unakarakasu man(u) nanakʉ nateku ponannakʉ.
S.PHON: aah ʔunakar~ɾakasu man(u) nanakɨ nateku ponannakɨ.
S.FORM: aah 'unakarakasu man(u) nanakʉ nateku ponannakʉ.
S.PHON: aah ʔunakar~ɾakasu man(u) nanakɨ nateku ponannakɨ.
S.TRANSL: 你有沒有女孩子,我想要求婚.
Do you have any girl that I wanted?

S.FORM: temaku arʉʉn m miseekia.
S.PHON: temaku ar~ɾɨɨn m miseekia.
S.FORM: temaku arʉʉn m miseekia.
S.PHON: temaku ar~ɾɨɨn m miseekia.
S.TRANSL: 我就說,我要娶回來.

TRANSL.notes: I say, 'I want to marry (her)'.

S.TRANSL: I say, 'I want to marry '.

S.FORM: noo makasiakieen pokarikari ia amanʉngcu sua tamna mamarang tamna manu.
S.PHON: noo makasiakieen pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia amanɨŋʦu sua tamna mamar~ɾaŋ tamna manu.
S.FORM: noo makasiakieen pokarikari ia amanʉngcu sua tamna mamarang tamna manu.
S.PHON: noo makasiakieen pokar~ɾikar~ɾi ia amanɨŋʦu sua tamna mamar~ɾaŋ tamna manu.

S.TRANSL: 如果我這樣說的話, 長輩們就會聽得懂了.
If I speak that way, their parents will understand.

S.FORM: aah makasua nava kariin isia va.
S.PHON: aah makasua nava kar~ɾiin isia va.
S.FORM: aah makasua nava kariin isia va.
S.PHON: aah makasua nava kar~ɾiin isia va.
S.TRANSL: 他的話原來是那樣.
His words are like that.

S.FORM: ponannakʉkia misee.
S.PHON: ponannakɨkia misee.
S.FORM: ponannakʉkia misee.
S.PHON: ponannakɨkia misee.
S.TRANSL: 原來對方是在跟我們求婚這樣.

TRANSL.notes: (Now I see) he is proposing to us.

S.TRANSL: he is proposing to us.

S.FORM: uh makasua sua ponannakʉ kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: uh makasua sua ponannakɨ kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: uh makasua sua ponannakʉ kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: uh makasua sua ponannakɨ kisɨɨn.
S.TRANSL: 所謂的求婚就是那樣!
The so-called proposing is like that.

S.FORM: nakai miana ikita Kanakanavu ia apacoe noo marivariin ia tekarakia miapacai nenen kusa tarikukakara sua tutuikara?
S.PHON: nakai miana ikita kanakanavu ia apaʦoe noo mar~ɾivar~ɾiin ia tekar~ɾakia miapaʦai nenen kusa tar~ɾikukakar~ɾa sua tutuikar~ɾa?
S.FORM: nakai miana ikita Kanakanavu ia apacoe noo marivariin ia tekarakia miapacai nenen kusa tarikukakara sua tutuikara?
S.PHON: nakai miana ikita kanakanavu ia apaʦoe noo mar~ɾivar~ɾiin ia tekar~ɾakia miapaʦai nenen kusa tar~ɾikukakar~ɾa sua tutuikar~ɾa?
S.TRANSL: 但是以前我們卡族呢,雖然若對方已經答覆了,我們是不是要宰殺什麼呢?究竟是雞還是豬?
But we Kanakanavu people, in the past, if they responded, shall we kill any animals? Should it be chicken or pigs?

S.FORM: ka'anpikia tavarʉ'ʉ nakai noo pacʉpcʉpʉngku ia ikita kanakanavu mamarang miana ia makai tia ucan mamia tarikuka serupaca noo.
S.PHON: kaʔanpikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ nakai noo paʦɨpʦɨpɨŋku ia ikita kanakanavu mamar~ɾaŋ miana ia makai tia uʦan mamia tar~ɾikuka ser~ɾupaʦa noo.
S.FORM: ka'anpikia tavarʉ'ʉ nakai noo pacʉpcʉpʉngku ia ikita kanakanavu mamarang miana ia makai tia ucan mamia tarikuka serupaca noo.
S.PHON: kaʔanpikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ nakai noo paʦɨpʦɨpɨŋku ia ikita kanakanavu mamar~ɾaŋ miana ia makai tia uʦan mamia tar~ɾikuka ser~ɾupaʦa noo.

TRANSL.notes: 我們還不知道,但是我若(仔細地)想的話,以前卡族的老人家好像只要用一隻雞.

S.TRANSL: 我們還不知道,但是我若 想的話,以前卡族的老人家好像只要用一隻雞.
We don't know, but when I think about it, Kanakanavu people used only one chicken in the past.

S.FORM: caniava noo marivariin sua tamna manu su man nanakʉ.
S.PHON: ʦaniava noo mar~ɾivar~ɾiin sua tamna manu su man nanakɨ.
S.FORM: caniava noo marivariin sua tamna manu su man nanakʉ.
S.PHON: ʦaniava noo mar~ɾivar~ɾiin sua tamna manu su man nanakɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 假如擁有女孩子的(長輩)答應的話.

S.TRANSL: 假如擁有女孩子的 答應的話.
If the parents of the girl said yes.

S.FORM: nakai tekara tekarakia pu'a paici 'apima 'inia ka'ankara?
S.PHON: nakai tekar~ɾa tekar~ɾakia puʔa paiʦi ʔapima ʔinia kaʔankar~ɾa?
S.FORM: nakai tekara tekarakia pu'a paici 'apima 'inia ka'ankara?
S.PHON: nakai tekar~ɾa tekar~ɾakia puʔa paiʦi ʔapima ʔinia kaʔankar~ɾa?

TRANSL.notes: 但是我(們)是不是要買酒給他們喝,還是不用?

S.TRANSL: 但是我 是不是要買酒給他們喝,還是不用?
But, do we have to but them some wine to drink or not ?

S.FORM: uh makasua sua.
S.PHON: uh makasua sua.
S.FORM: uh makasua sua.
S.PHON: uh makasua sua.
S.TRANSL: 就是那樣.
It's just like that.

S.FORM: uh kanakanavu miana tieen ng(u)coo mosa cocua ponannakʉ 'unakarakasu ka'an masimanʉng mara'an sua.

When Kanakanavu people went to other families to propose, would you say clearly and quickly.

But I want to say, something like how Kanakanavu people think about the pangolin.

S.TRANSL: 我們被稱為卡那卡那富的人,為什麼 忌諱觸摸和宰殺 ?

S.FORM: a'uneecu umavung.
S.PHON: aʔuneeʦu umavuŋ.

After that 'Usu was buried, how on earth could the pangolin know that 'Usu was buried there?

S.FORM: mokusa kan nia karinome takusʉrʉ kan mamia maki makivun makivun makivun makasi.

S.FORM: paritakaree 'inia sua si'inʉveeni.

Kanakanavu people are like that, because of that reason.

S.FORM: nimoringeekimi.

S.FORM: sii tinmanakia mamarang miana.

S.FORM: umarakamu karinome ia akunne'e taniura'ee pita'ioo 'apucaa misee mamarang miana.

S.TRANSL: 穿山甲若被套中,我 要吐…咀嚼蔓藤.
If the pangolin is trapped, we need to spit… chew the vine.

S.FORM: pueri'i inia apasavua putukirincu pariaruma.

S.TRANSL: 吐給牠治療牠,解開 然後讓他走.
Spit onto it to cure it, and then unleash the trap and release it.

S.FORM: apaco'e noo akaci kʉkiriin ia puerinpa nia 'uici.

If its leg is not good, we still need to spit on that part.

S.FORM: kasasavuana parirumaancu.

S.FORM: kasasavuana parirumaancu.

TRANSL.notes: (We) kept curing it, and let it go.

S.TRANSL: kept curing it, and let it go.

W.TRANSL: 使役-離開-處焦=狀態改變

S.FORM: ikim Kanakanavu ikim mamarang Kanakanavu miana ia makasua sua sinituturu ia.

S.FORM: ikim Kanakanavu ikim mamarang Kanakanavu miana ia makasua sua sinituturu ia.
S.PHON: ikim kanakanavu ikim mamar~ɾaŋ kanakanavu miana ia makasua sua sinitutur~ɾu ia.
S.TRANSL: 以前我們卡族老人家所說的就是那樣.
What our Kanakanavu elderly people said in the past is like that.

S.FORM: uh makasua cʉpʉng misee.
S.PHON: uh makasua ʦɨpɨŋ misee.
S.FORM: uh makasua cʉpʉng misee.
S.PHON: uh makasua ʦɨpɨŋ misee.

TRANSL.notes: (卡族人的)觀念是那樣.

S.TRANSL: 觀念是那樣.

TRANSL.notes: The (Kanakanavu's) view is like that.

S.TRANSL: The view is like that.

S.FORM: imo sua ikim Kanakanavu ia ka'ankim pa'apopang.
S.PHON: imo sua ikim kanakanavu ia kaʔankim paʔapopaŋ.
S.FORM: imo sua ikim Kanakanavu ia ka'ankim pa'apopang.
S.PHON: imo sua ikim kanakanavu ia kaʔankim paʔapopaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們卡族人不會隨便.
So we Kanakanavu people won't do things at will.

S.PHON: uh mataa ʔunapa sua uh uʦani.
S.FORM: uh mataa 'unapa sua uh ucani.
S.PHON: uh mataa ʔunapa sua uh uʦani.
S.TRANSL: 以及還有一個.
And there's another one.

S.FORM: sua ucani ia uʉ.
S.PHON: sua uʦani ia uɨ.
S.FORM: sua ucani ia uʉ.
S.PHON: sua uʦani ia uɨ.
S.TRANSL: 一個…
The one uh…

S.FORM: kan mesua ia kana kanacanca cumacancu sua pusian.
S.PHON: kan mesua ia kana kanaʦanʦa ʦumaʦanʦu sua pusian.
S.FORM: kan mesua ia kana kanacanca cumacancu sua pusian.
S.PHON: kan mesua ia kana kanaʦanʦa ʦumaʦanʦu sua pusian.
S.TRANSL: 當時是插秧季節,種稻米.
That was the season of sowing, we sow the rice.

S.FORM: uh matatacu na minana minana uh pusiam.
S.PHON: uh matataʦu na minana minana uh pusiam.
S.FORM: uh matatacu na minana minana uh pusiam.
S.PHON: uh matataʦu na minana minana uh pusiam.

TRANSL.notes: 到了趕鳥(時期),為稻米趕鳥.

S.TRANSL: 到了趕鳥 ,為稻米趕鳥.
During the time to expel birds, we expel birds for the sake of the rice.

S.FORM: sii sua pusian nokai iname ia kʉʉnʉn tapuroo.
S.PHON: sii sua pusian nokai iname ia kɨɨnɨn tapur~ɾoo.
S.FORM: sii sua pusian nokai iname ia kʉʉnʉn tapuroo.
S.PHON: sii sua pusian nokai iname ia kɨɨnɨn tapur~ɾoo.
S.TRANSL: 因為稻米如果沒有經過趕鳥,就會被麻雀吃了.
Because the rice, if we don't expel the birds, it will be eaten by the sparrow.

S.FORM: sua nganain nimosa minana ia pi'i kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: sua ŋanain nimosa minana ia piʔi kisɨɨn.
S.FORM: sua nganain nimosa minana ia pi'i kisʉʉn.
S.PHON: sua ŋanain nimosa minana ia piʔi kisɨɨn.
S.TRANSL: 去趕鳥過的人他名字叫做Pi'i.
The name of the person who had gone to expel birds was Pi'i.

S.FORM: mokusa nia mocʉmcʉm minana.
S.PHON: mokusa nia moʦɨmʦɨm minana.
S.FORM: mokusa nia mocʉmcʉm minana.
S.PHON: mokusa nia moʦɨmʦɨm minana.
S.TRANSL: 趕早去那裏趕鳥.

TRANSL.notes: (He) went there early to expel birds.

S.TRANSL: went there early to expel birds.

S.FORM: makasi cacan mʉtʉa man karianome.
S.PHON: makasi ʦaʦan mɨtɨa man kar~ɾianome.
S.FORM: makasi cacan mʉtʉa man karianome.
S.PHON: makasi ʦaʦan mɨtɨa man kar~ɾianome.
S.TRANSL: 到了路上,無意間發現小隻的穿山甲.

TRANSL.notes: On the way, (he) discovered a little pangolin.

S.TRANSL: On the way, discovered a little pangolin.

S.FORM: patisaa'e nia pitakusa na serevong tasikara serevong apacʉvʉrʉ.
S.PHON: patisaaʔe nia pitakusa na ser~ɾevoŋ tasikar~ɾa ser~ɾevoŋ apaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: patisaa'e nia pitakusa na serevong tasikara serevong apacʉvʉrʉ.
S.PHON: patisaaʔe nia pitakusa na ser~ɾevoŋ tasikar~ɾa ser~ɾevoŋ apaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ.
S.TRANSL: 他把牠抓起來丟進鐵籠,在鐵籠裡面飼養.
He caught it and put it into the cage, and bred it inside the cage.

S.FORM: matakoru 'uru apakʉn 'inia.
S.PHON: matakor~ɾu ʔur~ɾu apakɨn ʔinia.
S.FORM: matakoru 'uru apakʉn 'inia.
S.PHON: matakor~ɾu ʔur~ɾu apakɨn ʔinia.
S.TRANSL: 盛飯給牠吃.
Ladle the rice to feed it.

S.FORM: rorovana tecu mosa tanasa.
S.PHON: r~ɾor~ɾovana teʦu mosa tanasa.
S.FORM: rorovana tecu mosa tanasa.
S.PHON: r~ɾor~ɾovana teʦu mosa tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 每晚要去家裡了.

TRANSL.notes: Every night (he) went back home.

S.TRANSL: Every night went back home.

S.FORM: avice na tanasa.
S.PHON: aviʦe na tanasa.
S.FORM: avice na tanasa.
S.PHON: aviʦe na tanasa.

TRANSL.notes: (他)帶回家.

S.TRANSL: 帶回家.

TRANSL.notes: (He) brought back home.

S.TRANSL: brought back home.

S.FORM: mʉ nimosaku nia cʉmʉra mesua.
S.PHON: mɨ nimosaku nia ʦɨmɨr~ɾa mesua.
S.FORM: mʉ nimosaku nia cʉmʉra mesua.
S.PHON: mɨ nimosaku nia ʦɨmɨr~ɾa mesua.
S.TRANSL: 當時我有去看到.
I went there to have a look at the time.

S.FORM: mocanku mokusa tanaha tumaturu com coomia.
S.PHON: moʦanku mokusa tanaha tumatur~ɾu ʦom ʦoomia.
S.FORM: mocanku mokusa tanaha tumaturu com coomia.
S.PHON: moʦanku mokusa tanaha tumatur~ɾu ʦom ʦoomia.
S.TRANSL: 我離開回到家裡告訴我們的父親.
I left and went back home to tell our father.

S.FORM: AH cuma teci mananu nipapacʉvʉrʉ karinome tekara mamanʉng misee.
S.PHON: ah ʦuma teʦi mananu nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ kar~ɾinome tekar~ɾa mamanɨŋ misee.
S.FORM: AH cuma teci mananu nipapacʉvʉrʉ karinome tekara mamanʉng misee.
S.PHON: ah ʦuma teʦi mananu nipapaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ kar~ɾinome tekar~ɾa mamanɨŋ misee.
S.TRANSL: 穿山甲被人家養, 我說這樣好嗎 ?

TRANSL.notes: 'The pangolin is fed (by someone else), is it good?' I said.

S.TRANSL: 'The pangolin is fed , is it good?' I said.

S.FORM: aratakarʉ sua coomia mokusa 'inia mincau cʉmʉra makahi AH aka va makasia pi'e parirumo akun makasiacu kan api pusia misee.
S.PHON: ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ sua ʦoomia mokusa ʔinia minʦau ʦɨmɨr~ɾa makahi ah aka va makasia piʔe par~ɾir~ɾumo akun makasiaʦu kan api pusia misee.
S.FORM: aratakarʉ sua coomia mokusa 'inia mincau cʉmʉra makahi AH aka va makasia pi'e parirumo akun makasiacu kan api pusia misee.
S.PHON: ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ sua ʦoomia mokusa ʔinia minʦau ʦɨmɨr~ɾa makahi ah aka va makasia piʔe par~ɾir~ɾumo akun makasiaʦu kan api pusia misee.
S.TRANSL: 我們父親就起來去那裡看,然後說,Pi'i阿,那樣真的不好,不要這樣使自己觸犯禁忌了.
Our father stood up and went there to have a look. saying, 'Ah, Pi'i, that is really not good. Let it go, and do not make yourself violate the taboo.'

S.FORM: nakai ka'an pakituru.
S.PHON: nakai kaʔan pakitur~ɾu.
S.FORM: nakai ka'an pakituru.
S.PHON: nakai kaʔan pakitur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 但他不願意.

TRANSL.notes: But (he) did not want to.

S.TRANSL: But did not want to.

S.FORM: necʉre nen vane Kanakanavu cucuru puesi mihee?
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe nen vane kanakanavu ʦuʦur~ɾu puesi mihee?
S.FORM: necʉre nen vane Kanakanavu cucuru puesi mihee?
S.PHON: neʦɨr~ɾe nen vane kanakanavu ʦuʦur~ɾu puesi mihee?
S.TRANSL: 你看,為什麼說我們卡族人真的忌諱這件事?
You see, why do we Kanakanavu people really consider it a taboo?

S.FORM: aratakarʉ sua Pi'i mesua tia mivu.
S.PHON: ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ sua piʔi mesua tia mivu.
S.FORM: aratakarʉ sua Pi'i mesua tia mivu.
S.PHON: ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨ sua piʔi mesua tia mivu.
S.TRANSL: Pi'i 起來要去小便.
Pi'i stood up then, and went to pee.

S.FORM: makai karinome makasi hua ramucin.
S.PHON: makai kar~ɾinome makasi hua r~ɾamuʦin.
S.FORM: makai karinome makasi hua ramucin.
S.PHON: makai kar~ɾinome makasi hua r~ɾamuʦin.
S.TRANSL: 他的手這樣子像穿山甲.

TRANSL.notes: His hand is like this, like (the skin of) pangolin.

S.TRANSL: His hand is like this, like pangolin.

S.FORM: tia mivu.
S.PHON: tia mivu.
S.FORM: tia mivu.
S.PHON: tia mivu.
S.TRANSL: 他要小便.
He wanted to pee.

S.FORM: sua tina'anini ia kan makai ku kurarung ʉngcoo karinome.
S.PHON: sua tinaʔanini ia kan makai ku kur~ɾar~ɾuŋ ɨŋʦoo kar~ɾinome.
S.FORM: sua tina'anini ia kan makai ku kurarung ʉngcoo karinome.
S.PHON: sua tinaʔanini ia kan makai ku kur~ɾar~ɾuŋ ɨŋʦoo kar~ɾinome.
S.TRANSL: 他的身體呢,據說就變得像穿山甲的皮.
His body was said to be like pangolin's skin.

S.FORM: UH aranai inia ka'an pakituru pariruma uh cʉreekimia.
S.PHON: uh ar~ɾanai inia kaʔan pakitur~ɾu par~ɾir~ɾuma uh ʦɨr~ɾeekimia.

S.PHON: uh ar~ɾanai inia kaʔan pakitur~ɾu par~ɾir~ɾuma uh ʦɨr~ɾeekimia.

TRANSL.notes: 從那個時候(他)不願意放走(穿山甲),我們就去看.

S.TRANSL: 從那個時候 不願意放走 ,我們就去看.

TRANSL.notes: Since then, when he did not want let go of it, we (went to) look.

S.TRANSL: Since then, when he did not want let go of it, we look.

S.FORM: manasʉ can ucan takananga ka'an.
S.PHON: manasɨ ʦan uʦan takanaŋa kaʔan.
S.FORM: manasʉ can ucan takananga ka'an.
S.PHON: manasɨ ʦan uʦan takanaŋa kaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 或許一個小時…不對.
Maybe it's been one hour…No.

S.FORM: ucan UH ʉngcoo ikuripaee kisʉʉn uh Kanakanavu.
S.PHON: uʦan uh ɨŋʦoo ikur~ɾipaee kisɨɨn uh kanakanavu.
S.FORM: ucan UH ʉngcoo ikuripaee kisʉʉn uh Kanakanavu.
S.PHON: uʦan uh ɨŋʦoo ikur~ɾipaee kisɨɨn uh kanakanavu.
S.TRANSL: 一個…嗯…就卡語所謂的一個禮拜.
One… one week as it's called in Kanakanavu.

S.FORM: aranai inia noten mivu ia kan makasi ramucin makai karianome.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanai inia noten mivu ia kan makasi r~ɾamuʦin makai kar~ɾianome.
S.FORM: aranai inia noten mivu ia kan makasi ramucin makai karianome.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanai inia noten mivu ia kan makasi r~ɾamuʦin makai kar~ɾianome.
S.TRANSL: 從那時候,若要小便,他的手就這樣子像穿山甲一樣.
Since then, if he wanted to pee, it's said that his hands would become like the skin of the pangolin.

S.FORM: pʉ pacʉpʉcʉpʉngkim ah cucurua va aka apacʉvʉrʉ imo makasia misee.
S.PHON: pɨ paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋkim ah ʦuʦur~ɾua va aka apaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ imo makasia misee.
S.FORM: pʉ pacʉpʉcʉpʉngkim ah cucurua va aka apacʉvʉrʉ imo makasia misee.
S.PHON: pɨ paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋkim ah ʦuʦur~ɾua va aka apaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ imo makasia misee.
S.TRANSL: 我們一直想,的確養穿山甲是不好的事,所以說變這樣.
We are thinking, it's true that it's not good to foster pangolins, so it becomes like this.

S.FORM: noten mota'i ia arapipining makasia ramucin makai karianome.
S.PHON: noten motaʔi ia ar~ɾapipiniŋ makasia r~ɾamuʦin makai kar~ɾianome.
S.FORM: noten mota'i ia arapipining makasia ramucin makai karianome.
S.PHON: noten motaʔi ia ar~ɾapipiniŋ makasia r~ɾamuʦin makai kar~ɾianome.
S.TRANSL: 若要大便,就會出現那樣像穿山甲的手的面貌.
If he wanted to take a shit, his hands would be like the pangolin.

S.FORM: imo ikita Kanakanavu ia akun makasia.
S.PHON: imo ikita kanakanavu ia akun makasia.
S.FORM: imo ikita Kanakanavu ia akun makasia.
S.PHON: imo ikita kanakanavu ia akun makasia.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們卡族人不可以這樣子.
So we Kanakanavu people can never do this.

S.FORM: sirupa'e si Kanakanavu naa nimara karianumi nakai vanen makasua akun tavarʉ UH ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ mokʉrʉ sii cucuru puesia.
S.PHON: sir~ɾupaʔe si kanakanavu naa nimar~ɾa kar~ɾianumi nakai vanen makasua akun tavar~ɾɨ uh kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ mokɨr~ɾɨ sii ʦuʦur~ɾu puesia.
S.FORM: sirupa'e si Kanakanavu naa nimara karianumi nakai vanen makasua akun tavarʉ UH ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ mokʉrʉ sii cucuru puesia.
S.PHON: sir~ɾupaʔe si kanakanavu naa nimar~ɾa kar~ɾianumi nakai vanen makasua akun tavar~ɾɨ uh kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ mokɨr~ɾɨ sii ʦuʦur~ɾu puesia.

TRANSL.notes: 不知多少次卡族人原本拿(抓)到穿山甲,但因為那個原因,不能觸摸,因為非常忌諱.

S.TRANSL: 不知多少次卡族人原本拿 到穿山甲,但因為那個原因,不能觸摸,因為非常忌諱.

TRANSL.notes: Kanakanavu people had taken (caught) countless pangolins, but because of that reason, we couldn't touch them, because it's really a taboo.

S.TRANSL: Kanakanavu people had taken countless pangolins, but because of that reason, we couldn't touch them, because it's really a taboo.

S.FORM: imo ikita Kanakanavu ia ka'an ken sua necire ka'an puesi ia.
S.PHON: imo ikita kanakanavu ia kaʔan ken sua neʦir~ɾe kaʔan puesi ia.
S.FORM: imo ikita Kanakanavu ia ka'an ken sua necire ka'an puesi ia.
S.PHON: imo ikita kanakanavu ia kaʔan ken sua neʦir~ɾe kaʔan puesi ia.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們卡族人,你看,不遵守禁忌的...
So, we Kanakanavu people, you see, those who don't avoid the taboo...

S.FORM: kan poringenkee uh mara karianome.
S.PHON: kan por~ɾiŋenkee uh mar~ɾa kar~ɾianome.
S.FORM: kan poringenkee uh mara karianome.
S.PHON: kan por~ɾiŋenkee uh mar~ɾa kar~ɾianome.

TRANSL.notes: (他)套住然後抓了穿山甲.

S.TRANSL: 套住然後抓了穿山甲.

TRANSL.notes: (He) caught and took the pangolin.

S.TRANSL: caught and took the pangolin.

S.FORM: kamanʉng temaku umora makasi po'ocipi kʉmʉn.
S.PHON: kamanɨŋ temaku umor~ɾa makasi poʔoʦipi kɨmɨn.
S.FORM: kamanʉng temaku umora makasi po'ocipi kʉmʉn.
S.PHON: kamanɨŋ temaku umor~ɾa makasi poʔoʦipi kɨmɨn.
S.TRANSL: 他處理後剁掉煮了吃掉.
He worked on it, chopped and cooked it.

S.FORM: ikita kanakanavu ia ka'ankita tavarʉ'ʉ makasua.
S.PHON: ikita kanakanavu ia kaʔankita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ makasua.
S.FORM: ikita kanakanavu ia ka'ankita tavarʉ'ʉ makasua.
S.PHON: ikita kanakanavu ia kaʔankita tavar~ɾɨʔɨ makasua.
S.TRANSL: 我們卡族人呢,我們絕對不可那樣.
We Kanakanavu people, we cannot do that.

S.FORM: tumanaa 'ikua manasi ka'ankita pamuci.
S.PHON: tumanaa ʔikua manasi kaʔankita pamuʦi.
S.FORM: tumanaa 'ikua manasi ka'ankita pamuci.
S.PHON: tumanaa ʔikua manasi kaʔankita pamuʦi.
S.TRANSL: 聽我的話才不會犯錯.
Listen to me, so that we don't make mistakes.

S.FORM: makasua ma sua setuturu kamua.
S.PHON: makasua ma sua setutur~ɾu kamua.
S.FORM: makasua ma sua setuturu kamua.
S.PHON: makasua ma sua setutur~ɾu kamua.
S.TRANSL: 我要告訴你們的就是那樣.
What I'm telling you is only that.

S.FORM: uh manmanmaku arasingsingai.
S.PHON: uh manmanmaku ar~ɾasiŋsiŋai.
S.FORM: uh manmanmaku arasingsingai.
S.PHON: uh manmanmaku ar~ɾasiŋsiŋai.
S.TRANSL: 我的後代晚輩們,要平安喔!
My offspring, may peace be with you !

S.FORM: makasuaku.
S.PHON: makasuaku.
S.FORM: makasuaku.
S.PHON: makasuaku.
S.TRANSL: 我那樣.
Like me.

S.FORM: ikam manmanmaku ia setuturumaku kamua ia arasingsingooku aparapa nupasʉ apara kʉna.
S.PHON: ikam manmanmaku ia setutur~ɾumaku kamua ia ar~ɾasiŋsiŋooku apar~ɾapa nupasɨ apar~ɾa kɨna.
S.FORM: ikam manmanmaku ia setuturumaku kamua ia arasingsingooku aparapa nupasʉ apara kʉna.
S.PHON: ikam manmanmaku ia setutur~ɾumaku kamua ia ar~ɾasiŋsiŋooku apar~ɾapa nupasɨ apar~ɾa kɨna.
S.TRANSL: 你們這些我的晚輩們,我要告訴你們的是,要祝福我還可以獲得財產,獲得食物.
You, my offspring, what I want to tell you is, pray that I can still be made to have income and food.

S.FORM: ʉmʉkʉrʉpa mamane manasi.
S.PHON: ɨmɨkɨr~ɾɨpa mamane manasi.
S.FORM: ʉmʉkʉrʉpa mamane manasi.
S.PHON: ɨmɨkɨr~ɾɨpa mamane manasi.
S.TRANSL: 我才能留在世上.
So that I can still live in the world.

S.FORM: unapa sua masitianpa tumutututuru kamua.
S.PHON: unapa sua masitianpa tumutututur~ɾu kamua.
S.FORM: unapa sua masitianpa tumutututuru kamua.
S.PHON: unapa sua masitianpa tumutututur~ɾu kamua.
S.TRANSL: 還有那個,一直叮嚀告訴你們.
And one more, I keep telling you.

TRANSL.notes: 說-TIAN(叮嚀)=助詞

S.FORM: makasua karimaku kamua.
